why: additive validate-before-draft + issue-emission contract for the Scanner: 14 scanner scenarios + 2 gateway scenarios, all self-clearing on already-frozen features (structural diff addOnly true, modified 0, removed 0). New disposition:open|resolved field on the strategy shape (owned by combat-log-governance) gives a validation-cut a durable, auditable, append-only tombstone that emits no issue and is excluded from the pending count; gateway honors the exclusion on the read side (mirrored producer/consumer duty). Cold spec-judge ALIGNED across oracle/builder/architect on BOTH touched units after three remediation rounds (round1 governance-preflight; round2 oracle agent-filed-marker + log-side symmetry, builder cut-disposition-durable-home + decorative-scenario removal; round3 architect layering reword + consumer-side enforcement). No hard floor: no narrowing (Clearance), additive minor (Compatibility), specialization not contradiction (Conflict). Self-asserted within auto-spec leash, medium blast; root status stays implemented (per-unit CR).
